args.query: SELECT book_id, title, categories, details, rating_number FROM books_info WHERE store = 'Amazon' AND (categories ILIKE '%Literature & Fiction%' OR details ILIKE '%Literature & Fiction%') AND (details ILIKE '%English%' OR categories ILIKE '%English%' OR title ILIKE '%English%');

result.preview:
"I wasn’t able to retrieve any book records from the books_database (the books_info table query returned no rows), so I can’t determine which specific English-language Literature & Fiction books have a perfect 5.0 average rating.

From the review_database I can see many purchase_ids whose associated books have a perfect 5.0 average rating, but without any matching entries in books_database (where the book metadata, categories, and language are stored), I can’t:

Given the available data and the requirement to restrict to English-language books in the ‘Literature & Fiction’ category, there are effectively no answerable matches. If you have an updated or corrected books_database (or a subset of it), I could rerun the analysis to list all such books."
